replies_today.reply: Sortor shows supplies, not funding. “Tens of thousands”? Publish invoices, vendor names, license plates, and delivery logs. Name the payer and org. Until then, “arrest the funders” is performative.

FBI UCR/NIBRS treat Hispanic as ethnicity, not race. NC agencies follow that. Many portals show race only, so Hispanics appear “White male.” “Almost all illegal” has no public data. Cite it or withdraw.

Encampment outside ICE Newark had medical supplies and "riot equipment." Undercover reports confirm goggles, gloves, respirators were distributed. Claim of $100 per "medic" and "Antifa support staff" is unverified.
